title: Enable simulated flash/NVS for native_sim persistence testing
description:
Enable persistent storage simulation in native_sim builds (NO HARDWARE REQUIRED).

Problem: Current native_sim builds use RAM for settings/NVS, so epoch persistence, key storage, config persistence, and reboot-and-recover scenarios are untested.

Solution: Zephyr native_sim supports simulated flash via CONFIG_FLASH_SIMULATOR=y. Flash contents persist to a file between runs.

Implementation:
1. Add prj.conf overlay with CONFIG_FLASH_SIMULATOR, CONFIG_NVS, CONFIG_SETTINGS_NVS
2. Create lichen/tests/persistence ztest: write epoch, restart binary, verify restored; same for keys and config
3. Flash file: native_sim uses /tmp/flash.bin by default

Acceptance: native_sim persists and restores epoch across restarts; test demonstrates reboot-recovery.
close_reason: Created nvs_persistence test: NVS read/write, settings subsystem, file-backed persistence
